memberdef.definition: typedef int32(AccelByte::FRSAEncryptionOpenSSL::* FAuthHandlerComponentAccelByte::PF_CRYPTO) (const TArrayView< const uint8 >, TArray< uint8 > &)
memberdef.name: PF_CRYPTO

detaileddescription.para: handler for encrypting with the RSA key
handler for encrypting with the AES key
Processes an incoming packet during the handshake stage.
set up the client's secure data from Credentials information.
